title: Banana 16x
description: Banana 16x gives Minecraft a fresh look with green diamond gear and orange netherite, all in a clean and simple 16x style.
body:
🍌 Banana 16x

A clean PvP-focused resource pack that retextures Minecraft with smooth 3D models and optimized visuals for combat.

📖 What's in this pack?

This is my first resource pack, built to give Minecraft PvP a fresh and lightweight style. I’ve redesigned all the main combat visuals so the game feels sharper, cleaner, and easier to play without losing the vanilla vibe.

Changes include:

All tools & armor redesigned with a consistent, clean style

3D crystals for clearer PvP practice and fights

Custom shields, bows, and crossbows with simplified models

Smaller totem for better visibility during battles

✅ Features

Lightweight design optimized for PvP and practice worlds

3D models where it makes sense, but still keeps performance high

Works great for both casual play and competitive combat

Clean visuals so your screen isn’t cluttered in fights

Supports the latest versions of Fabric & vanilla Minecraft

📖 Usage

Download the pack from Modrinth.

Place it in your resourcepacks folder.

Enable it in Minecraft’s Resource Packs menu.

Enjoy smoother visuals and cleaner PvP gameplay!

📖 Notes

This is a resource pack, not a mod. It works with vanilla Minecraft.

Can be combined with shaders or performance mods like Sodium/Iris.

Works well for crystal PvP, anchoring, and general practice worlds.

If you have feedback or suggestions, feel free to DM me on Discord: Naturebanana
